question: What makes Vyteca different?
answer: I specialise in hospitality, so I already know what turns a hungry browser into a booking. Most studios build your site and disappear; I stay on as your ongoing partner, keeping it fast, current, and earning its keep. Every build is backed by my triple guarantee, because looking good isn't the same as filling tables.

question: How long until my site is live?
answer: Faster than you'd expect. Many studios take months; here, most sites go live in around a week from the kickoff call, with the brief, design, hand-coding, and a review round all built in. The one variable is you, since it moves as fast as you can approve the design and send through your photos and copy. Opening soon? Tell me your date and I'll work to it.

question: What if I already have a website?
answer: That's common, and often the best time to rebuild. Done properly, a redesign keeps your existing SEO foundation intact, so your rankings hold and often improve rather than reset. I preserve the content, structure, and redirects that matter, then rebuild on top: faster, sharper, and built to convert. You keep everything you've earned and lose the parts holding you back.
